source_pr.title: kv/union_store:remove tableinfo from union_store
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: AndreMouche

### What problem does this PR solve?
This PR removes tableinfo from union_store
Part of https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/22513

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->
Tests 
- Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->
- No release note

evidence: evidence: "collation , source from `mysql` . `bind_info` where `update_time` > ? order by `update_time`")) (infoschema/tables_test.go)
